Dev: Universal health check configuration — Replace hardcoded '/health' endpoint checks with configurable HEALTH_CHECK_PATH and HEALTH_CHECK_TIMEOUT variables. Add skip-health-check flag for projects without health endpoints. Default: HEALTH_CHECK_PATH='/health', HEALTH_CHECK_TIMEOUT=5. Transform 4 hardcoded curl -sf --max-time N "http://localhost:${port}/health" calls to use ${HEALTH_CHECK_PATH} and ${HEALTH_CHECK_TIMEOUT}.

Dev: Safe pipe wrappers for grep/find/awk — Add safe_pipe() helper function that appends '|| true' to any command and captures exit code. Create wrappers: safe_grep(), safe_find(), safe_awk() that auto-handle pipefail. Then transform the 32 unsafe raw pipes (identified in analysis) to use these wrappers. Pattern: change 'grep -n "pattern" file | head -10' to 'safe_grep -n "pattern" file | head -10 || true'. Add comment '# safe_pipe: no fail on empty results' for clarity.
Fix Database Tests: Fix ALL 4 failing enrollment_token_test.go tests in services/auth-service/repository/enrollment_toke
Implement API Gateway: Create services/gateway/main.go as API gateway routing to all microservices (ports 8001-8005). Imple
Implement Analytics Service: Create services/analytics-service/main.go with HTTP server on port 8006. Create services/analytics-s
Implement Organization Service: Create services/organization-service/main.go on port 8007. Create services/organization-service/hand
Complete Frontend TODOs: Complete 5 remaining TODO comments in web/dashboard. 1) web/dashboard/src/features/devices/Devices.t

Fix Database Connection Tests: Fix 9 failing tests in services/job-service/repository/job_assignment_test.go. All tests fail with 'dial tcp 127.0.0.1:5432: connect: connection refused'. The test suite requires PostgreSQL to be running but it's not available during test execution. Options: 1) Add testcontainers/go for automated PostgreSQL container lifecycle in tests, 2) Add docker-compose.test.yml for test infrastructure, 3) Mock the database layer for unit tests. Implement testcontainers approach as it provides real database testing. Create internal/testutil/db.go with testcontainers setup. Update job_assignment_test.go to use the test database helper. Ensure tests cleanup properly after each test run.

Fix Failing Enrollment Token Tests: Fix 4 failing tests in services/auth-service/repository/enrollment_token_test.go. Tests fail with 'relation enrollment_tokens does not exist (SQLSTATE 42P01)'. The migration file 000006_create_enrollment_tokens_table.up.sql exists but tests aren't running migrations properly. Fix internal/testutil/migrate.go to ensure enrollment_tokens table is created before tests run. Verify testutil setup calls all migration files, not just users table. Run tests with full migration suite to confirm fix: go test -v ./services/auth-service/repository/...

Build and Verify Frontend Dashboard: Dashboard components exist but frontend shows 'no' build status. Navigate to web/dashboard, run npm install if needed, then execute npm run build. Verify TypeScript compilation with npm run type-check. Fix any TS errors that prevent build. Ensure Vite can bundle the React application. Verify build artifacts are generated in web/dashboard/dist/. This phase validates the frontend is production-ready after the component creation rounds.

Frontend Testing Suite: Dashboard has no test files. Create test suite for React components using React Testing Library and Vitest. Add tests for: LoginForm (submit with valid/invalid credentials), JobList (render jobs, filter functionality), DeviceList (display devices, status indicators), DocumentList (upload, delete actions), Dashboard home (stats display). Create web/dashboard/src/__tests__/ directory. Add test setup in web/dashboard/vitest.config.ts. Ensure npm run test passes with at least 70% coverage.

End-to-End Testing with Playwright: Implement comprehensive E2E tests using Playwright for the dashboard frontend. Create tests/e2e/ directory covering: user authentication flows (login, logout, password reset), job management (create, list, cancel, retry jobs), device management (register printers, view status, configure settings), document upload and retrieval, dashboard navigation, and settings changes. Configure Playwright to run against local docker-compose stack and remote environments. Add visual regression testing for critical pages. Integrate E2E tests into CI pipeline with video recordings on failure.

Performance and Load Testing: Create load testing suite using k6 or Vegeta to validate system performance under stress. Define test scenarios simulating: concurrent user logins, parallel job submissions, high-frequency agent heartbeats, document upload bursts, and WebSocket connection scaling. Establish performance baselines and SLOs (e.g., 95th percentile latency < 200ms for API calls, 1000 concurrent users). Add tests/load/ directory with scenarios for each service. Create performance dashboard showing metrics over time. Set up automated performance regression detection in CI.
